title: asphodelus subalpinus
intro: Asphodelus subalpinus, also known as Alpine asphodel, is a perennial plant species belonging to the asphodel family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, and is often used to treat conditions like bronchitis and coughs. Alpine asphodel can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, making it a popular choice in folk medicine for its versatility and potential health benefits.
